返回小說天地Fiction 返回首頁Home

中篇小說【紅樓夢黑色少女死亡名單及其它】The Black List of Girls’ Deaths in Dream of the Red Chamber — and Others

本系列以《紅樓夢》為基礎，從不同於傳統紅學研究角度，重新觀看大觀園中一個個花季少女的悲慘命運。作者不以考證、索隱、版本研究為重點，而是將目光，集中於那些被繁華掩蓋的悲劇人生。 在賈府花團錦簇、烈火烹油的盛世背後，許多純潔、美麗、充滿靈性的少女，卻一步步走向毀滅。有人死於愛情，有人死於婚姻，有人死於權力鬥爭，有人死於封建禮教，也有人在漫長絕望中，被慢慢吞噬。 本系列以小說化散文方式，重新描寫秦可卿、林黛玉、晴雯、迎春、香菱、妙玉、鴛鴦、史湘雲、王熙鳳等諸多人物的命運，同時也試圖探討：《紅樓夢》真正哀悼的，也許不只是愛情，而是人世間一切美好事物，如何在現實與制度中被一步步摧毀。
本系列文章目錄
序　紅樓夢黑色少女死亡名單及其它Preface — The Black List of Girls’ Deaths in Dream of the Red Chamber — and Others 秦可卿·天香樓上的那根繩子Qin Keqing: The Rope on the Tower of Heavenly Fragrance

The Black List of Girls’ Deaths in Dream of the Red Chamber — and Others中篇小說【紅樓夢黑色少女死亡名單及其它】

This series is based on Dream of the Red Chamber, but approaches the novel from a perspective different from traditional Redology studies. Rather than focusing on textual research, hidden meanings, or edition studies, the author turns attention toward the tragic destinies of the young girls hidden beneath the splendor of the Grand View Garden. Behind the dazzling prosperity and luxurious glory of the Jia household, many pure, beautiful, and spiritually gifted girls slowly move toward destruction. Some die for love, some for marriage, some for power struggles, some under the crushing weight of feudal morality, while others are slowly devoured by long despair. Written in the style of fictionalized literary prose, this series reimagines the fates of many characters including Qin Keqing, Lin Daiyu, Qingwen, Yingchun, Xiangling, Miaoyu, Yuanyang, Shi Xiangyun, Wang Xifeng, and others. At the same time, it attempts to explore a deeper question: perhaps what Dream of the Red Chamber truly mourns is not merely love itself, but the gradual destruction of all beautiful things within human society, crushed step by step beneath reality and social systems.
Series Directory
Preface — The Black List of Girls’ Deaths in Dream of the Red Chamber — and Others序　紅樓夢黑色少女死亡名單及其它 Qin Keqing: The Rope on the Tower of Heavenly Fragrance秦可卿·天香樓上的那根繩子
